ABOUT US
Welcome to
WILLIE RAE'S Social House
About Us
Welcome To
WILLIE RAE'S Social House
Welcome to Willie Rae’s Social House! We are a locally-owned neighborhood gathering spot featuring a creative menu with a Cajun flair. As a locally-owned restaurant, we take pride in being more than just a place to eat; we’re a community hub where you can truly eat, drink and be social. Join us for the best of both worlds from our daily brunches that kickstart your day to our Cajun-inspired lunches and dinners made from scratch to our signature cocktails and local craft beers make you want to eat, drink and be social! We believe in serving the best to ensure every socialite leaves full and happy. Check out our nightly dinners and entertainment specials. We support our local community, and so do you, with every sip and bite you take!
Our Menu

Menu - WR Social House
The full menu
Willie Rae’s Social House
The full menu
Willie Rae’s
Social House
Drink Menu
Draft beer List
Brunch Everyday
Available daily until 4:00 PM
BREAKFAST SPECIALTIES
Made Fresh From Scratch
SOUTHERN BREAKFAST
2 Eggs Any Style, Applewood Smoked Bacon, Fried Green Tomato & a Buttermilk Biscuit. Served with a Choice of White Cheddar Grits or Rosemary-Garlic Breakfast Potatoes.
NOLA EGGS COCHON
Slow-Smoked Cajun Pulled Pork Served Over a Buttermilk Biscuit, Topped with Two Over Medium Eggs, Drizzled with Hollandaise Sauce. Served with a Choice of White Cheddar Grits or Rosemary-Garlic Breakfast Potatoes.
BAYOU SHRIMP & EGGS
Blackened Shrimp Sautéed with Our Creole Tomato Sauce, Two Over Medium Eggs & Buttermilk Biscuit. Served with a Choice of White Cheddar Grits or Rosemary-Garlic Breakfast Potatoes.
THE BIG EASY BREAKFAST
2 Eggs Any Style, Browned Andouille Sausage, Caramelized Onions & a Buttermilk Biscuit. Served with a Choice of White Cheddar Grits or Rosemary-Garlic Breakfast Potatoes.
SHRIMP & GRITS
Blackened Gulf Shrimp Sautéed with Our Creole Tomato Sauce Over Rich & Creamy White Cheddar Grits. Served with a Buttermilk Biscuit.
CHICKEN & WAFFLE
Fluffy Belgian Home-Made Waffle with Our Signature Fried Chicken.
HUEVOS RANCHEROS
2 Eggs Any Style, On a Bed of Corn Tortillas, Topped with Shredded Cheese, Zesty Ranchero Sauce, Chorizo, Avocado Slices, Jalapeños, Cherry Tomatoes & Fresh Cilantro.
SHORT RIB HASH
5 Hour Slow-Smoked Beef Short Ribs, Seasoned Potatoes, Onions, Green Peppers, Cheddar Cheese, Soft Scramble with White Cheddar Grits & a Buttermilk Biscuit.
CATFISH GRITS & EGGS
Fried Catfish with Our Creole Tomato Sauce Over Our Rich & Creamy White Cheddar Grits & 2 Eggs Any Style. Served with a Biscuit.
SCRAMBLE IT UP!
NORWEGIAN SCRAMBLE
Eggs Scrambled with Smoked Salmon, Carmelized Onions, Diced Tomatoes, Cream Cheese Topped with Dill & Capers. Served with a Buttermilk Biscuit and a Choice of White Cheddar Grits or Rosemary-Garlic Breakfast Potatoes.
GREEK "FITNESS FREAK" SCRAMBLE
Egg Whites Scrambled with Spinach, Tomatoes & Feta. Served with a Buttermilk Biscuit & a Choice of White Cheddar Grits or Rosemary-Garlic Breakfast Potatoes.
LET'S GET TOASTED!
GUAC-N-ROLL TOAST
Slice of Locally-Baked Challah Bread Avocado Toast Topped with Marinated Grape Tomatoes & Balsamic Drizzle.
AVOCADO SALMON TOAST
Slice of Locally-Baked Challah Bread Avocado Toast Topped with Marinated Grape Tomatoes, Smoked Salmon & Capers.
FRENCH TOAST
FRENCH QUARTERS
Challah Bread Toast Bites, Flash-Fried and Tossed in Cinnamon Sugar & Drizzled with Sweet Cream Anglaise.
CLASSIC FRENCH TOAST
Challah Bread French Toast with Maple Syrup & Light Butter.
STRAWBERRY SHORTCAKE TOAST
Challah Bread French Toast Topped with Fresh Strawberries & Sweet Cream.
TIPSY BANANA FRENCH TOAST
Challah Bread French Toast, Topped with Rum-Flambéed Bananas & Sweet Cinnamon Butter.
VERY RASPBERRY TOAST
Challah Bread French Toast Topped with Home-Made Raspberry
